description: per-group AdamW betas + weight decay on embeddings/lm_head/resid
Muon momentum warmup 0.97 over 400 steps (worse - never reaches target in 109 steps)
warmdown 0.5->0.65 (much worse - too little time at peak LR with only 109 steps)
warmdown 0.5->0.35 + final LR 0.05 (more time at peak LR = huge win)
QK-norm post-scale q,k *= 1.15 to sharpen attention (huge win +0.017)
VE gate scale 2->3 (borderline 0.0028 improvement, not simplification)
VE gate init uniform(0,0.02) instead of zeros (noise-level 0.0005)
SwiGLU replacing relu^2 (worse + more VRAM + fewer steps)
attention pattern SSSL->SSLL (worse, more long-range hurts)
matrix LR 0.07 with 2^18 batch (borderline 0.0012, not simplification)
matrix LR 0.07 + WD 0.3 combined (worse, doesn't stack)
GELU replacing relu^2 (worse, relu^2 is better)
VE gate scale 2->3 retest (worse with 2^18 batch)
MLP ratio 4x->3x (46M params, 233 steps, +0.013 huge win)
